ChangeRequest.name: Discuss handling of Observed Agent information
ChangeRequest.comment:
<!-- See: documentation on [Issues in GitLab](https://gitlab.sofa.dev/sdd-bird-team/bird-logical-data-model/-/wikis/Issues-in-GitLab) -->
# Overview Observed agent information in the LDM is hidden. Should it be more explicit, and should it be part of the _Model context_.
### Contact person _[me@ecb.europa.eu]_
### Background information Currently the BIRD LDM has the `Reporting agent identifier` as part of the model context information in all its entity types that contain reporting facts. The information on the _Observed agent_ can be found via the _Group_ structure where the _Internal group_ has the _Reporting agent internal group role_, and the _Group is a _Domestic institutional unit_ that links to a _Party_ that is an _Organisation_. This _Organisation_ is the _Observed agent_ for domestic purposes. If the _Organisation_ has an _Organisational unit_ that is a _Foreign branch_ and that _Foreign branch is linked to a _Foreign institutional unit_, then that _Foreign branch_ is the Observed agent.
At the same time, the _Organisation_ could be a _Financial corporation_ with a _Central bank and private sector company role_ of _Subsidiary (of the reporting agent)_. But that is linked to another _Internal group_.
See also https://gitlab.sofa.dev/sdd-bird-team/bird-logical-data-model/-/issues/501#note_2017004 that shows the need for the observed agent perspective when dealing with cross-border intra-company loans.
See this model subview for reference:
![observed_agent_information_in_BIRD](/uploads/6458343d59e16b94fa65a9433fe1b185/observed_agent_information_in_BIRD.png)
### Points/Questions to resolve 1. Should the entity type _Reporting agent_ as used in the model context be linked to the _Reporting agent internal group role_? 2. Do we need to distinguish elements to be reported - like _Instrument_, _Collateral_, _Debtor_, et cetera - per observed agent? 3. Do we need to revisit the _Internal group_ structure for subsidiaries?
### Related issues This is related to issue #216 where the modelling of transfers per observed agent is requested.
### Before closing checklist - [ ] Assignee for review - [ ] Assignee to close - [ ] Other actions
